arts.ttl: Barcelona receive major boost as star man 'agrees' to sign new long-term deal
arts.sum: Barcelona reportedly agree a new deal with Spain international Lamine Yamal, who is set to commit his long-term future to the Catalan giants.

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi declines invitation to attend Barcelona’s 125th anniversary gala
arts.sum: Next Friday, Barcelona will celebrate their 125th birthday. The Catalan club was forced on the 29th of November in 1899, and to make the occasion, a celebratory gala is being held, and the expectation is that there will be a plethora of club icons in attendance. However, it’s now confirmed that Barcelona’s greatest ever player […] The post Lionel Messi declines invitation to attend Barcelona’s 125th anniversary gala appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: €80m – Barcelona learn financial outlay required for free agent target
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have been informed of the financial outlay which would be required to secure the signing of LOSC Lille star Jonathan David. That’s according to Diario Sport,…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star struggling for fitness, could drop to bench vs Celta Vigo
arts.sum: Barcelona star Alejandro Balde could be dropped to the bench for the club’s meeting with Celta Vigo on Saturday. That’s according to Barca insider Toni Juanmarti of Diario Sport, who…

arts.ttl: Official: Trio of youngsters called up as Barcelona name squad for Celta clash
arts.sum: The squad of players set to be depended upon by La Liga table-toppers Barcelona for their return to action this evening has been unveiled. And it features, most notably, a…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick challenges five Barcelona players to step up in Lamine Yamal absence
arts.sum: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick has challenged his team to perform without teenage prodigy Lamine Yamal, who remains sidelined through injury.

arts.ttl: Spanish Police make three arrests during El Clásico for racist chants aimed at Barcelona players
arts.sum: El Clásico is always the one fixture in Spanish football that raises emotions and passion more than any other. Sometimes, however, this can spill over into some unsavoury scenes. This…

arts.ttl: 3 arrested for Clásico racism to Yamal, Raphinha
arts.sum: Spanish police have arrested three people in relation to racist insults aimed at Barcelona duo Lamine Yamal and Raphinha during last month's Clásico at the Bernabéu.

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi praises 'spectacular' Barcelona with Hansi Flick's side as legend reveals his pride at seeing La Masia products impress
arts.sum: Barcelona are currently six points clear at the top of LaLiga, albeit having played a game more than their closest challengers Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: ‘Barcelona eyeing Ajax full-back: Liverpool also interested’
arts.sum: FC Barcelona are keeping a close eye on Devyne Rensch's contract situation, according to Diario Sport on Saturday (via Voetbal Primeur).
